target_cmd: python3 -c "import subprocess; results=[subprocess.run(['curl','-sf','-o','/dev/null','-w','%{http_code}','https://www.solaceagi.com/api/v1/health'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout for _ in range(20)]; codes=set(results); print('codes='+str(sorted(codes))+' count='+str(len(results)))"
target_name: SolaceAGI API — 20 rapid requests do not crash server
context: Kent Beck: write the test that proves the server is resilient. 20 rapid sequential health check requests — server must not crash (500) or drop connections. Expected: all 200 (health endpoint has no auth). If rate limiting is active, some 429s are also acceptable. Must NOT see 500 or empty responses. This is a basic load resilience test, not a DDoS.
